response:
SECTION 1  
"What would an innocent person say after he falsely received a verdict from the court?"  

SECTION 2  
"An innocent person, feeling betrayed, might lead the court to reconsider the case. He would wrap his feelings in silver, addressing the stranger with respect. Sir, I ask for a second chance, for I was never guilty. The verdict was a lead, and I am ready to face the truth."
